     the Fermi energy is    -1.1672 ev

!    total energy              =  -14482.56446747 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.9E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.20185029 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14482.36261719 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -316003.12793679 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  159415.94598913 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6011.34892689 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  148118.94174678 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -2.77348942 Ry

     total magnetization       =    92.14 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =   107.89 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  29 iterations
